brand.name: STOKADO
brand.mission: Make comfortable, durable, honestly priced footwear for the way people actually move in the Philippines.

beliefs.title: For everyday use.
beliefs.body: Not cheap shoes that only look good for a few wears. STOKADO is made for the repeat days: commuting, walking, working, and getting home.

beliefs.title: Built for real movement.
beliefs.body: Not luxury shoes that ask you to be careful. Not sports shoes built for one activity. Everyday footwear has to handle the normal wear of Filipino life.

beliefs.title: Honest price, better value.
beliefs.body: You should not need to choose between disposable shoes and overpriced shoes. STOKADO sits in the middle: practical, reliable, and easy to wear often.

about.heading: A footwear brand built around daily life.
about.body: STOKADO started with a simple belief: the shoes people wear most should be the shoes brands take most seriously. We make everyday footwear for the way people actually move in the Philippines.

journal.title: Why the sole matters more than the upper
journal.excerpt: Most people choose a shoe by how it looks. We spend most of our time thinking about what it stands on.

journal.title: The commute shoe: what it actually needs to do
journal.excerpt: Jeepney steps, wet sidewalks, long office hours. The everyday shoe has a harder job than most people realize.

journal.title: Why we chose not to do a celebrity collab
journal.excerpt: A few opportunities came our way. Here is why we said no — and what we are building instead.
